div.p:
By an exchange of notes dated November 26 and December 12, 1951, at Managua, the United States and Nicaragua concluded an agreement, which entered into force on the latter date, providing for the free movement of military aircraft of each country through the airspace of the other. The notes were transmitted to the Department of
State under cover of despatch 450, from Managua, December 19, 1951, not printed (611.1794/12–1951). For text, see TIAS No. 2460, or 3 UST (pt. 2) 2863.
